name: 2xAAA Battery Holder
description: Printed cavity holding two AAA batteries (10.5mm Ø × 44.5mm) side by side in series, providing 3.0V nominal. Three flat metal contact plates with springs/dome contacts are inserted into channels in the end walls during the pause. Pin side (+Y) has two small plates (V+ and GND), connector side (-Y) has one wide plate bridging the cells in series.

pins.label: Positive tab (3V)
pins.description: Positive tab from small plate, reaching ink traces through floor.

pins.label: Ground tab (-)
pins.description: Negative tab from small plate, reaching ink traces through floor.

features.label: positive plate channel
features.description: Slot in +Y wall for V+ contact plate, 1mm wall separates from GND.

features.label: negative plate channel
features.description: Slot in +Y wall for GND contact plate, 1mm wall separates from V+.

features.label: inter-cell plate channel
features.description: Slot in -Y wall for wide bridging plate (full body height, open at pause for insertion).

features.label: V+ dome window
features.description: Opening for dome contact on V+ plate to reach battery, starts at plate inner face.

features.label: GND spring insertion slot
features.description: Open-top slot from channel center through roof at GND spring to allow insertion.

features.label: bridging spring insertion slot
features.description: Open-top slot from channel center through roof at bridging plate spring to allow insertion.

features.label: inter-cell dome window
features.description: Opening for dome contact on inter-cell bridging plate to reach battery, starts at plate inner face.

features.label: V+ pin passthrough
features.description: Floor slot for V+ tab to reach ink traces.

features.label: GND pin passthrough
features.description: Floor slot for GND tab to reach ink traces.

features.label: hatch floor opening
features.description: Through-hole for battery access (narrower than hatch, panel rests on ledges).

features.label: hatch ledge left
features.description: Left shelf for hatch panel (depth = 1.5mm panel + 0.3mm clearance).

features.label: hatch ledge right
features.description: Right shelf for hatch panel (depth = 1.5mm panel + 0.3mm clearance).

features.label: hatch tab catch near
features.description: Wide recess for spring hook snap-fit in -Y wall.

features.label: hatch tab catch far
features.description: Wide recess for ledge tab in +Y wall.
